headline: Assessing Iron Mountain (IRM) Valuation After A Powerful Multi Month Share Price Run
summary: Why Iron Mountain is on investors’ radar Iron Mountain (IRM) has drawn attention after a strong recent run, with the share price up 25.99% over the past month and 38.05% over the past 3 months, prompting fresh interest in its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Iron Mountain. The recent 9.62% 7 day share price return and 52.80% year to date share price return suggest momentum is building on top of an already strong 5 year total shareholder return of 276.69%.
